fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code that is associated with a city.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city linked to the postal code in the Code field.

fields.name: Search City
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Time Zone
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time zone for the selected post code.
